summary: Comprehensive testing of Iteration 8 features - Fees module (auto-overdue, concession, sibling discount, sequential receipts) and Attendance module (holidays, alerts, employee attendance, parent notification). All 16 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified.
seed_data_creation: Test holidays created and cleaned up during testing. Test concession applied to first student.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 8 features working. Stripe payments and email notifications are MOCKED. Sequential receipt format: REC/YYYY-YY/NNNN. Holiday blocking prevents attendance on holiday dates.

features_tested.admin_login: PASS - Admin login works with admin@test.com / Test1234!
features_tested.fees_refresh_overdue: PASS - POST /api/fees/refresh-overdue auto-marks pending installments as overdue
features_tested.fees_apply_concession: PASS - POST /api/fees/concession applies concession to student
features_tested.fees_sequential_receipt: PASS - POST /api/fees/pay generates receipt in REC/YYYY-YY/NNNN format
features_tested.attendance_blocked_on_holiday: PASS - POST /api/attendance returns 400 on holiday dates
features_tested.attendance_alerts: PASS - GET /api/attendance/alerts returns students below threshold
features_tested.frontend_attendance_tabs: PASS - Attendance page shows Students/Employees/Report/Alerts/Holidays tabs
features_tested.frontend_holidays_tab: PASS - Holiday tab shows Add Holiday button and holiday list
features_tested.frontend_alerts_tab: PASS - Alerts tab shows threshold input and Check Alerts button
features_tested.frontend_fees_concessions_tab: PASS - Fees page shows Concessions tab with Apply Concession button
features_tested.frontend_fee_config_sibling_discount: PASS - Fee config dialog shows Sibling Discount % field

mocked_apis.stripe_payments: MOCKED - Stripe payment gateway is mocked
mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - Email/SMS notifications via Resend are mocked
